name: Iso11783IL_OPChangeFontAttribute
title: Iso11783IL_OPChangeFontAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783IL_OPChangeFontAttribute( dword objectID, dword color, dword size, dword type, dword style ); // form 1
description: The function changes the properties of a font attribute object. A Change Font Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of the font attribute object
